answers: Research rates on Glassdoor, know your worth, let employer offer first, negotiate with data.
Before negotiating: check Glassdoor and LinkedIn for market rates, then confidently counter with data to back your ask.
Salary negotiation tip: always let the employer name a number first, then negotiate up using market research from Glassdoor or Levels.fyi.
Know your market value, practice your pitch, and don't be afraid to negotiate — most employers expect it.
